title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.171 - Definitions
text:
210.171.  Definitions. — As used in sections 210.170 to 210.173 and section 143.1000, the following terms shall mean:
  (1)  "Board", the children's trust fund board created in section 210.170;
  (2)  "Prevention program", any community-based educational or service program designed to prevent or alleviate child abuse or neglect.
(L. 1983 H.B. 550 § 1)
